ai_role: Enterprise AI distribution, Azure cloud, and productivity platform
tvs_tiebreaker: TVS should dominate because MSFT is an AI distribution and monetization platform, not a pure physical chokepoint.
technical_timing_rule: Technicals guide add pacing; core ownership should depend on enterprise AI monetization and Azure durability.
rationale: Microsoft has scarce enterprise distribution, Azure infrastructure, and productivity workflow control. It is a core AI compounder rather than a hard supply-chain bottleneck.
